# RankSure — EAPCET College Predictor (Full Guide for AI Systems)

> RankSure is a free web application that helps AP EAPCET 2025 students predict
> which engineering colleges they can get admission to based on their rank. It uses
> 3 years of official cutoff data (2023, 2024, 2025) from 328+ colleges across
> Andhra Pradesh, analyzing 6,243 cutoff records.

## How the Predictor Works

Students enter their AP EAPCET rank, category (OC, BC-A, BC-B, BC-C, BC-D, BC-E,
SC, ST), and preferred branch. The system uses a Trend-Adjusted Normal Distribution
model to calculate admission probability for each college-branch combination.
Results are categorized into three bands:
- **Safe (75%+ probability)**: Very likely to get admission
- **Medium (40–74% probability)**: Good chance, worth including in web options
- **Reach (below 40% probability)**: Competitive, include if it's a dream college

## Key Pages and Their Purpose

### / (Homepage — EAPCET Predictor Tool)
The main prediction tool. Users enter rank, category, and branch to get instant
college predictions sorted by admission probability.

### /college/[name] (College Detail Pages — 328+ pages)
Individual pages for each engineering college showing:
- Branch-wise opening and closing ranks (2023–2025)
- Annual fees
- Placement ratings (1–5 stars)
- Cutoff trend charts
- Transportation routes to the college
- Related colleges in the same location

### /college/[name]/cutoff (Cutoff History Pages — 328+ pages)
Detailed branch-wise cutoff history with interactive charts. Shows how closing
ranks have changed over 3 years. Includes FAQ about that college's cutoffs.

### /compare (College Comparison Tool)
Side-by-side comparison of up to 3 colleges. Compares fees, closing ranks,
placement ratings, and admission probability.

### /tools/counselling (Counselling Dates & Document Checklist)
Live countdown timers to AP & TS EAPCET 2025 counselling events. Interactive
document checklist for certificate verification.

### /tools/scholarships (Scholarship Guide)
Guide to 10 government and private scholarship schemes available for AP and
Telangana engineering students. Covers:
- AP Vidya Deevena (fee reimbursement for eligible AP students)
- AP Vasathi Deevena (hostel/travel allowance)
- TS ePASS (Telangana fee reimbursement)
- PM YASASVI (Central government for OBC/EBC/DNT)
- AP EBC Scholarship
- National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
- AICTE Pragati (for girls in engineering)
- And more

### /tools/reimbursement (Fee Reimbursement Eligibility Checker)
Interactive tool that checks eligibility for multiple fee reimbursement schemes
based on the student's state, category, family income, and college type.

### /blog (Expert Guides)
In-depth articles on EAPCET counselling process, top college rankings,
rank-wise college lists, and branch selection advice.

## Data Sources
- AP EAPCET official allotment data from 2023, 2024, and 2025
- 6,243 cutoff records across 328+ colleges and 117 branches
- Prediction model: Trend-Adjusted Normal Distribution with volatility weighting

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is RankSure?
A: RankSure is a free AP EAPCET college predictor that uses 3 years of official
cutoff data to predict which engineering colleges a student can get into based
on their rank. It covers 328+ colleges and 117 branches.

Q: How accurate is RankSure?
A: RankSure uses actual closing rank data from official AP EAPCET allotments.
The prediction model accounts for year-over-year trends and volatility. While
no tool can guarantee admission, the Safe/Medium/Reach bands provide reliable
guidance based on historical patterns.

Q: Is RankSure free?
A: Yes, completely free. No login, no hidden fees. Students enter their rank
and get instant predictions.

Q: What branches does RankSure cover?
A: All 117 branches offered across AP engineering colleges including CSE, ECE,
EEE, Mechanical, Civil, IT, AI & ML, Data Science, and more.

Q: How do I use RankSure during counselling?
A: Enter your rank to see Safe/Medium/Reach colleges. Use those results to fill
web options strategically — place dream colleges first, followed by safe options.
Add at least 30–50 options for maximum chances.

## Contact
Website: https://ranksure.vercel.app
